def solve(nums : Array(Int64), k : Int64) : Int64
    n = nums.len
    
    if n == 0
        return -1

    # 1. Precompute Prefix Maximums (PMax)
    pMax = Array(n)
    pMax[0] = nums[0]
    for i in 1...n-1
        pMax[i] = pMax[i-1].max(nums[i])
    end
    
    # 2. Precompute Suffix Minimums (SMin)
    sMin = Array(n)
    sMin[n-1] = nums[n-1]
    for i in (0..n-2).reverse
        sMin[i] = sMin[i+1].min(nums[i])
    end

    # 3. Find the smallest stable index
    for i in 0...n-1
        # Instability = max(nums[0..i]) - min(nums[i..n-1])
        instability = pMax[i] - sMin[i]
        
        if instability <= k
            return i.to_int64
        end
    end

    # If no stable index is found
    return -1
end
